sn2.19:1.2: As he was standing to one side, Uttara the deva’s son recited this verse in the Blessed One’s presence:
sn2.19:2.1: “Life is swept along, next-to-nothing its span.
sn2.19:2.2: For one swept on by aging no shelters exist.
sn2.19:2.4: one should do deeds of merit that bring about bliss.”
sn2.19:3.1: The Buddha: “Life is swept along, next-to-nothing its span.
sn2.19:3.2: For one swept to old age no shelters exist.
sn2.19:3.4: one should drop the world’s bait and look for peace.”
